events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: "riding in bucket" on a commercial construction project, Sitework & Utilities, Equipment safety. OSHA 1926 Subpart O covers motor vehicles, mechanized equipment, and marine operations. Riding in a bucket of equipment like a loader/backhoe/excavator bucket is an OSHA violation - personnel shall not ride in buckets. This is a serious safety violation. Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical. Work stage: in-progress. Component conditions: non-compliant. Findings: personnel riding in equipment bucket. Actions: stop work, remove personnel from bucket, use proper personnel platform/aerial lift. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart O.
